title: Inside the Riyadh meeting: What Arab and Muslim ministers agreed on as Iran war escalates
summary_full: Arab and Muslim nations convened in Riyadh, issuing a unified call to condemn escalating attacks and defend sovereignty amid the Iran vs US-Israel conflict. Ministers stressed de-escalation and protecting energy infrastructure, signalling a collective desire to avert a wider war. The gathering highlighted a delicate regional balance, prioritising stability and dialogue over outright confrontation.
